input.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

raw.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

winner: The funeral was so exclusive, even past vice presidents had to RSVP twice—once for the service, once just to see who else showed up.

candidates.text: I guess if you wait long enough for a vice president's funeral, all four of them will show up—though they'll probably forget why.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Surprising twist on the expectation of vice presidents attending, with a touch of dry humor and specificity to the situation."}

candidates.text: Dick Cheney's funeral was so historic, they had to break out the VP body bag—literally.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'VP body bag' are clever and specific, tying the joke directly to the headline with a surprising twist."}

candidates.text: Cheney's funeral was so exclusive, even the past vice presidents had to RSVP—but their collective "no" made it a full house!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on exclusivity, concise and specific with clever wordplay on 'RSVP' and 'full house'."}

candidates.text: The funeral was so exclusive, even past vice presidents had to RSVP twice—once for the service, once just to see who else showed up.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on exclusivity, specific to the context, concise, and uses clever wordplay with 'RSVP twice'."}

candidates.text: Why did the past vice presidents show up together? Because they realized they had nothing better to do than attend a funeral—and that was just the beginning of their political career!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the headline, but the punchline feels forced and lacks natural flow. The reference to 'the beginning of their political career' is confusing and doesn't clearly connect to the setup."}
